mixedsubjectsirt 0.0.0.9000
  • Reference

Loss function for parameter estimation. Generally not called directly by users.

mixed_subjects_loss.Rd

Loss function for parameter estimation. Generally not called directly by users.

Usage

mixed_subjects_loss(pars, q_observed, q_predicted, q_llm, lambda = 0)

Arguments

pars

A vector of item parameters in slope-intercept form. Passed with discriminations first, location second, in item order.

q_observed

A quadrature object constructed from running mixed_subjects_quadrature on LLM-generated item responses

q_predicted

A quadrature object constructed from running mixed_subjects_quadrature on predicted item responses for the human calibration sample

lambda

The power tuning parameter. Takes values between 0 and 1. When lambda is zero, disregards predicted data completely

Value

Loss for the mixed subjects estimator at the values of pars

On this page
